# JZ-HDL

> JZ-HDL is a hardware description language designed for clear, analyzable, and synthesis‑friendly RTL.

Hardware Correctness by Construction

## Table of Contents

### Quick Start

- [Overview](/jz-hdl/getting-started/overview.md)
- [Contract](/jz-hdl/getting-started/contract.md)
- [Installation](/jz-hdl/getting-started/installation.md)
- [CLI Usage](/jz-hdl/getting-started/cli-usage.md)
